phase: C-1AR — Pilot Architecture Review & Rollout Strategy
mandate: Review & planning only. No enrichment, no production writes, no new metadata, no question changes, C-2 NOT executed. STOP for approval.
sequencing_note: Prior C-2 already shipped Context + Archetype repo-wide; pilot measured the deferred capability/behavior/signal on top. Context/Archetype = Wave 1 done; Waves 2-4 plan the deferred dims.

output1_pilot_validation.reliability: Two-frame honesty intact; facet spreads real; non-fabrication held (two-key signal rule).
output1_pilot_validation.scalability: Archetype/Context scale cleanly; Capability partial (text ceiling ~49%); Behavior/Signal do not scale as text-only.

output2_architecture_reassessment.capability: Partially Validated (high yield, only 48.6% text coverage; 'massively' tempered)
output2_architecture_reassessment.signal: Not Validated (ordering overturned: flagship pools ungrounded; per-question evidence 1.2%; backfill is hardest not cheapest)
overturned_assumptions: Signal is NOT cheapest/first for flagship pools
Behavior headroom not realizable from question text alone
output2_architecture_reassessment.upgraded: Archetype is the single highest-yield dimension

output3_rollout_priority.roi_logic: ROI proportional to (yield x coverage) / complexity; Signal/Behavior blockers sit upstream of enrichment
output3_rollout_priority.key_change: Signal demoted from C-1A #1 to #4-of-remaining; Behavior demoted to curated track

output4_signal_strategy.two_key_rule: Assign signal only when tag has grounding AND question text carries evidence; else UNCLASSIFIED

feasibility.ungrounded_25_incl_flagship: Not feasible until WC-class grounding built

output4_signal_strategy.verdict: Conditional grounding-gated activity; repo-wide flagship mass-backfill REJECTED

wave1.action: verify via AQ-2R gate + lock taxonomies

wave3.3b: WC-class grounding for 25 ungrounded then backfill

wave4.approach: curated authoring; close Academic/Competitive context gap

output7_governance.context: Approved for rollout (shipped; close corpus gap)
output7_governance.capability: Approved with Modifications (coverage gate + evidence broadening)
output7_governance.signal: Approved with Modifications for 119 grounded tags; Not Approved for flagship mass-backfill
output7_governance.behavior: Not Approved as text-only auto-enrichment (curated revisit)

output9_c2_recommendation: Proceed with re-sequenced, coverage-gated, grounding-gated C-2. Wave1 done. Execute Waves 2-4 in order, flag-gated, reversible, AQ-2R measurement non-negotiable. No flagship signal mass-backfill. No text-only behavior. Separate reversible structures per enrichment.

output10_go_no_go.go: Phased, measured, coverage- and grounding-gated rollout in re-sequenced order
no_go: signal backfill on ungrounded flagship pools

stop: WAIT FOR APPROVAL — review & planning only; no writes; C-2 not started.
